title: excoecaria lucida
intro: Excoecaria lucida, also known as the "tree of death," is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various skin conditions, including eczema and wounds. Excoecaria lucida can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its preparation and use should be approached with caution due to its toxic properties.
